name: FBC Midlothian
description: FBC Midlothian is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Midlothian, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: FBC Waxahachie
description: Come play pickleball at FBC Waxahachie in Waxahachie, TX! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Longbranch Baptist Church
description: Longbranch Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Midlothian, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Midlothian Community Park
description: Midlothian Community Park is a place to play pickleball in Midlothian, TX. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Midlothian Sports Complex
description: Located behind Frank Seale Middle School

name: Ovilla - Cindy Jones Park
description: Ovilla - Cindy Jones Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ovilla, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Pickleball Paradise TX
description: This club in Midlothian boasts four regulation size Pickleball courts with permanent lines and nets. Introductory clinics, lessons, open play sessions, special events, private party bookings, private court reservations and more are offered at Pickleball Paradise. All offerings can be enjoyed by members and non members, giving everyone the chance to enjoy pickleball in “Paradise”. Pickleball Paradise is committed to the vision of building a pickleball “family” within our Ellis County community. Paddles and balls may be rented or purchased, as well as other pro shop items available for sale. A shaded pavilion by the courts with an oversized patio and new LED lights over the courts make it easy to enjoy pickleball during the day or night at this club.

name: Rotary Park
description: Come play pickleball at Rotary Park in Ennis, TX! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
